examples: Far from being defeated, bandits' reputation for invincibility was often strengthened by the manner of their death.
Yet there are signs the belief in US invincibility is waning.
Central banking is a subtle art that rests largely on the institution's ability to convey an aura of invincibility.
The only question is what was the premium on its now-lost image of invincibility?
The increasing invincibility of Google's search advertising dominance hasn't gone unnoticed by anti-trust authorities.
